cards.title: Microbiology & Antibiotic Guide
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Common pathogens by system (URTI, UTI, pneumonia, cellulitis)
  • Empirical antibiotic selection (India antibiogram)
  • Culture result interpretation
  • Resistance patterns: MRSA, ESBL, CRE in India
  • Tropical diseases: Dengue, malaria, typhoid, leptospirosis
